testcases.input: s = "aababbb" Output: 3 Explanation: All possible variances along with their respective substrings are listed below: - Variance 0 for substrings "a", "aa", "ab", "abab", "aababb", "ba", "b", "bb", and "bbb". - Variance 1 for substrings "aab", "aba", "abb", "aabab", "ababb", "aababbb", and "bab". - Variance 2 for substrings "aaba", "ababbb", "abbb", and "babb". - Variance 3 for substring "babbb". Since the largest possible variance is 3, we return it.
